---
title: "Highlighted Milestone"
---

[← Gallery](../gallery.html)

`.vertical` with a user-defined `.highlight` class that enlarges the dot and changes its color for a single event. Everything else uses the default styling.

<style>
.ex-milestone .event.highlight {
  --tl-color-dot:    #dc2626;
  --tl-color-dot-bg: #dc2626;
  --tl-color-label:  #dc2626;
}
.ex-milestone .event.highlight::after {
  width:  calc(var(--tl-dot-size) * 1.6);
  height: calc(var(--tl-dot-size) * 1.6);
  left:   calc(-30px - var(--tl-dot-size) * 0.8);
}
</style>

::: {.timeline .vertical .ex-milestone}
::: {.event data-label="Jan"}
Initial planning completed. Scope and milestones agreed by all stakeholders.
:::
::: {.event data-label="Mar"}
Beta released to internal testers. Feedback loop established.
:::
::: {.event data-label="Jun" .highlight}
**Public launch** — version 1.0 ships to all users.
:::
::: {.event data-label="Aug"}
First patch release addressing early user feedback and edge cases.
:::
::: {.event data-label="Oct"}
Version 1.1 ships with the first set of community-requested features.
:::
:::

````markdown
<style>
.ex-milestone .event.highlight {
  --tl-color-dot:    #dc2626;
  --tl-color-dot-bg: #dc2626;
  --tl-color-label:  #dc2626;
}
.ex-milestone .event.highlight::after {
  width:  calc(var(--tl-dot-size) * 1.6);
  height: calc(var(--tl-dot-size) * 1.6);
  left:   calc(-30px - var(--tl-dot-size) * 0.8);
}
</style>

::: {.timeline .vertical .ex-milestone}
::: {.event data-label="Jan"}
Initial planning completed.
:::
::: {.event data-label="Mar"}
Beta released to internal testers.
:::
::: {.event data-label="Jun" .highlight}
**Public launch** — version 1.0 ships.
:::
::: {.event data-label="Aug"}
First patch release.
:::
:::
````
